---
name: New pain
about: Submit a pain you've hit that isn't in the guide
title: '[PAIN] '
labels: new-pain
---

## The pain

In one sentence, in your own voice. Example: "My GPU job crashed at hour 14 and I lost everything."

## What's happening

Concrete description. What did you try? What broke?

## The pattern

The class of problem this is an instance of.

## The primitives that solve it

Cloud native pieces that address the pain. Tools, projects, primitives.

## What you keep / What you give up

Trade-offs.

## Where you hit this

Briefly: company stage, workload type, scale. Helps calibrate whether this is a universal pain or a niche one.
